World Cup Viewing Parties · Live Matches on the Big Screen · Redding Sports Park

Welcome

Good food,
great company

Inside Redding Sports Park, The Black Sheep Gastropub is the spot where the action happens — on the field and on the plate.

Craft burgers, fresh tacos, crispy wings. Cold drinks. And when there's a match on, we've got the screens and the atmosphere to go with it.

Open Mon–Thu from 3pm, Fri–Sat from 11:30am, and Sundays 9am–4pm. Come watch the game with us.
